agentAbility.name: Grand Slam
agentAbility.description: Calls in a massive bomb strike after a delay. The bomb penetrates objects and detonates underground, creating a seismic blast wave that pushes enemies back.

agentTrait.name: Juggernaut
agentTrait.description: Ensures safe movement through hazardous environments such as minefields and napalm, while also clearing through map physics objects and pushing players in or out of danger

tankAbilities.name: Incendiary Charges
tankAbilities.description: Turret-mounted launchers fire grenades in a ballistic arc. On impact, each leaves a Napalm area that sets enemies on Fire. The Napalm area also emits smoke columns that block enemies' line of sight and Thermal Vision.

tankAbilities.name: Line Charges
tankAbilities.description: The vehicle is briefly Immobilized as its turret-mounted launchers fire a pair of charges in a ballistic arc. After a short delay, a detonation sequence triggers along the projectile paths, dealing explosive damage, damaging tracks, and Slowing enemies.
